con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:ricevutans="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:richiestans="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <wsdl:documentation>Versione 1.2</wsdl:documentation> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:import namespace="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> <xsd:schema elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:import namespace="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="ricevuta"> <wsdl:part name="VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta" element="ricevutans:VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="richiesta"> <wsdl:part name="VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta" element="richiestans:VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="visualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaPT"> <wsdl:operation name="visualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <wsdl:input message="tns:richiesta"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:ricevuta"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="visualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaBinding" type="tns:visualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaPT"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="visualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it/VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="demVisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <wsdl:port name="demVisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBianca" binding="tns:visualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:9080/DemRicettaBiancaPrescrittoServicesWeb/services/demVisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:td="http://tipodativisualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:import namespace="http://tipodativisualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="TipiDatiVisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBianca.xsd"/> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:element name="VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elemento base per la richiesta di visualizzazione della ricetta bianca prescritta dal medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="pinCode" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>PinCode inviante</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codicePaziente" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Fiscale/STP/ENI che rappresenta l'assistito per cui viene compilata la ricetta</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nrbe" type="td:nrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="pinNrbe" type="td:pinNrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero breve Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cfMedico" type="td:cfMedicoType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice fiscale del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="opzioniRequest" type="td:opzioniType" maxOccurs="10" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://tipodativisualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://tipodativisualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:simpleType name="stringType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:maxLength value="256"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="cfMedicoType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="16"/> <xs:maxLength value="16"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="string3Type"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="3"/> <xs:maxLength value="3"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codSpecializzazioneType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="1"/> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="tipoPrescType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="1"/> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="dataOraType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="19"/> <xs:maxLength value="19"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="ripetibilitaType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="0"/> <xs:enumeration value="1"/> <xs:enumeration value="3"/> <xs:enumeration value="4"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="num2DecimaliType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="([0-9]{1,2})"/> <xs:maxLength value="2"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="num1DecimaliType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="([0-9]{1})"/> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="tdlType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="0"/> <xs:enumeration value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="nonSostType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codMotivazNonSostType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="1"/> <xs:enumeration value="2"/> <xs:enumeration value="3"/> <xs:enumeration value="4"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="nrbeType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="12"/> <xs:maxLength value="12"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="pinNrbeType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="5"/> <xs:maxLength value="5"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codEsitoType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[0-9]{4}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="string1Type"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:complexType name="erroreRicettaType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codEsito" type="codEsitoType"/> <xs:element name="esito" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="identificativoProdPrest" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="tipoErrore" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="dettaglioPrescrizioneRicettaBiancaType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codProdPrest" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice prodotto farmaceutico (AIC)</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="descrProdPrest" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Descrizione testuale del prodotto farmaceutico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codGruppoEquival" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice del gruppo di equivalenza secondo AIFA, solo per farmacia di classe A</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="descrGruppoEquival" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Descrizione testuale del gruppo di equivalenza secondo AIFA</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nonSost" type="nonSostType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Clausola di non sostituibilita', 1 in caso di non sostituibilita'</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codMotivazNonSost" type="codMotivazNonSostType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Motivazione codificata di non sostituibilita'</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="tdl" type="tdlType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Terapia del dolore: 0 - NO, 1 - SI</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="descrTestoLiberoNote" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Nota esplicativa libera</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="quantita" type="num2DecimaliType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Quantita' di confezioni prescritte</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="posologia" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Posologia</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="durataTrattamento" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Durata trattamento</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="modalitaImpiego" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Modalità impiego</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="preparazFarmaceutica" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Preparazione farmaceutica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="numRipetibilita" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero ripetibilità</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="validitaFarm" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Validità farmaco</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="prescrizione1" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Campo destinato a informazioni aggiuntive</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="prescrizione2" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Campo destinato a informazioni aggiuntive</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="stato" type="string1Type" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Stato della prescrizione</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="comunicazioneType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codice" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice della comunicazione di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="messaggio" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Messaggio di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="opzioniType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="chiave" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Chiave del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="valore" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Valore del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="tipo" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Tipologia del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://visualizzaprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:td="http://tipodativisualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:import namespace="http://tipodativisualizzaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="TipiDatiVisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBianca.xsd"/> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:element name="VisualizzaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elemento base della ricevuta per la richiesta di visualizzazione della ricetta prescritta dal medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="protocolloTransazione" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Identificativo univoco della transazione</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="dataRicezione" type="td:dataOraType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Data ricezione della transazione</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cfMedico" type="td:cfMedicoType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice fiscale del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nomeMedico" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Nome del medico prescrittore</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cognomeMedico" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Cognome del medico prescrittore</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codRegione" type="td:string3Type" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Regione / Provincia Autonoma del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codASLAo" type="td:string3Type" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice ASL del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codStruttura" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice struttura del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codSpecializzazione" type="td:codSpecializzazioneType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Specializzazione del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="specialClinica" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Specializzazione clinica del medico in testo libero</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="numIscrizAlbo" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero di iscrizione all'Albo professionale del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="indirMedico" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Indirizzo del medico prescrittore, vedere specifica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="telefMedico" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Telefono del medico prescrittore</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="testata1" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Campo destinato a informazioni aggiuntive</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="testata2" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Campo destinato a informazioni aggiuntive</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codicePaziente" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Fiscale/STP/ENI che rappresenta l'assistito per cui viene compilata la ricetta</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cognNome" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Cognome e nome dell'assistito</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="indirizzo" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Indirizzo dell'assistito</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="tipoPrescrizione" type="td:tipoPrescType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>F - Farmaceutica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codDiagnosi" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice diagnosi o del sospetto diagnostico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="descrDiagnosi" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Descrizione della diagnosi o del sospetto diagnostico in testo libero</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="dataCompilazione" type="td:dataOraType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Data compilazione della ricetta, formato aaaa-mm-gg hh24:mm:ss</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="dettaglioPrescrizioneRicettaBianca" type="td:dettaglioPrescrizioneRicettaBiancaType" maxOccurs="99" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco singole prescrizioni</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nrbe" type="td:nrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="pinNrbe" type="td:pinNrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero breve Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="statoProcesso" type="td:string1Type" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Stato della ricetta bianca</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codCatRicetta" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Sigla breve Categoria Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="dataInserimento" type="td:dataOraType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Data inserimento negli archivi del SAC</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codEsitoVisualizzazione" type="td:codEsitoType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice dell'esito della Visualizzazione</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="opzioniResponse" type="td:opzioniType" maxOccurs="10" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="erroreRicetta" type="td:erroreRicettaType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Ripetizione di ErroreRicetta</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="comunicazione" type="td:comunicazioneType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Ripetizione di Comunicazioni di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="flagPromemoria" type="td:string1Type" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Flg restituzione promemoria</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="pdfPromemoria" type="xs:base64Binary" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Promemoria in pdf</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

<wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://invioprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:ricevutans="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:richiestans="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="http://invioprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <wsdl:documentation>Versione 1.2</wsdl:documentation> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:import namespace="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> <xsd:schema elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:import namespace="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="ricevuta"> <wsdl:part name="InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta" element="ricevutans:InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="richiesta"> <wsdl:part name="InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta" element="richiestans:InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="invioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaPT"> <wsdl:operation name="invioPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <wsdl:input message="tns:richiesta"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:ricevuta"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="invioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaBinding" type="tns:invioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaPT"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="invioPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://invioprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it/InvioPrescrittoRicettaBianca"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="demInvioPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <wsdl:port name="demInvioPrescrittoRicettaBianca" binding="tns:invioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:9080/DemRicettaBiancaPrescrittoServicesWeb/services/demInvioPrescrittoRicettaBianca"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:td="http://tipodatiinvioprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:import namespace="http://tipodatiinvioprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="TipiDatiInvioPrescrittoRicettaBianca.xsd"/> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:element name="InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elemento base per l'invio al SAC della ricetta bianca prescritta dal medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="pinCode" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>PinCode inviante</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cfMedico" type="td:cfMedicoType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice fiscale del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codRegione" type="td:string3Type" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Regione / Provincia Autonoma del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codASLAo" type="td:string3Type" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice ASL del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codStruttura" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice struttura del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codSpecializzazione" type="td:codSpecializzazioneType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Specializzazione del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="specialClinica" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Specializzazione clinica del medico in testo libero</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="numIscrizAlbo" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero di iscrizione all'Albo professionale del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="indirMedico" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Indirizzo del medico prescrittore, vedere specifica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="telefMedico" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Telefono del medico prescrittore</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="testata1" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Campo destinato a informazioni aggiuntive</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="testata2" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Campo destinato a informazioni aggiuntive</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codicePaziente" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Fiscale/STP/ENI che rappresenta l'assistito per cui viene compilata la ricetta</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cognNome" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Cognome e nome dell'assistito</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="indirizzo" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Indirizzo dell'assistito</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="tipoPrescrizione" type="td:tipoPrescType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>F - Farmaceutica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codDiagnosi" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice diagnosi o del sospetto diagnostico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="descrDiagnosi" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Descrizione della diagnosi o del sospetto diagnostico in testo libero</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="dataCompilazione" type="td:dataOraType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Data compilazione della ricetta, formato aaaa-mm-gg hh24:mm:ss</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="opzioniRequest" type="td:opzioniType" maxOccurs="10" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="dettaglioPrescrizioneRicettaBianca" type="td:dettaglioPrescrizioneRicettaBiancaType" maxOccurs="99" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco singole prescrizioni</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://tipodatiinvioprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://tipodatiinvioprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:simpleType name="stringType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:maxLength value="256"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="cfMedicoType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="16"/> <xs:maxLength value="16"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="string3Type"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="3"/> <xs:maxLength value="3"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codSpecializzazioneType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="1"/> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="tipoPrescType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="1"/> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="dataOraType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="19"/> <xs:maxLength value="19"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="ripetibilitaType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="0"/> <xs:enumeration value="1"/> <xs:enumeration value="3"/> <xs:enumeration value="4"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="num2DecimaliType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="([0-9]{1,2})"/> <xs:maxLength value="2"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="num1DecimaliType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="([0-9]{1})"/> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="tdlType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="0"/> <xs:enumeration value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="nonSostType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codMotivazNonSostType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="1"/> <xs:enumeration value="2"/> <xs:enumeration value="3"/> <xs:enumeration value="4"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="nrbeType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="12"/> <xs:maxLength value="12"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="pinNrbeType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="5"/> <xs:maxLength value="5"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codEsitoType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[0-9]{4}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="string1Type"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:complexType name="erroreRicettaType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codEsito" type="codEsitoType"/> <xs:element name="esito" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="identificativoProdPrest" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="tipoErrore" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="dettaglioPrescrizioneRicettaBiancaType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codProdPrest" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice prodotto farmaceutico (AIC)</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="descrProdPrest" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Descrizione testuale del prodotto farmaceutico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codGruppoEquival" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice del gruppo di equivalenza secondo AIFA, solo per farmacia di classe A</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="descrGruppoEquival" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Descrizione testuale del gruppo di equivalenza secondo AIFA</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nonSost" type="nonSostType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Clausola di non sostituibilita', 1 in caso di non sostituibilita'</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codMotivazNonSost" type="codMotivazNonSostType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Motivazione codificata di non sostituibilita'</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="tdl" type="tdlType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Terapia del dolore: 0 - NO, 1 - SI</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="descrTestoLiberoNote" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Nota esplicativa libera</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="quantita" type="num2DecimaliType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Quantita' di confezioni prescritte</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="posologia" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Posologia</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="durataTrattamento" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Durata trattamento</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="modalitaImpiego" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Modalità impiego</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="preparazFarmaceutica" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Preparazione farmaceutica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="numRipetibilita" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero ripetibilità</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="validitaFarm" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Validità farmaco</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="prescrizione1" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Campo destinato a informazioni aggiuntive</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="prescrizione2" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Campo destinato a informazioni aggiuntive</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="comunicazioneType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codice" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice della comunicazione di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="messaggio" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Messaggio di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="opzioniType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="chiave" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Chiave del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="valore" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Valore del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="tipo" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Tipologia del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:td="http://tipodatiinvioprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:import namespace="http://tipodatiinvioprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="TipiDatiInvioPrescrittoRicettaBianca.xsd"/> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:element name="InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elemento base della ricevuta dell'invio al SAC della ricetta prescritta dal medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="protocolloTransazione" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Identificativo univoco della transazione</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nrbe" type="td:nrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="pinNrbe" type="td:pinNrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero breve Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="dataInserimento" type="td:dataOraType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Data inserimento negli archivi del SAC</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codEsitoInserimento" type="td:codEsitoType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice dell'esito dell'inserimento</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nomeMedico" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Nome del medico prescrittore</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cognomeMedico" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Cognome del medico prescrittore</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="opzioniResponse" type="td:opzioniType" maxOccurs="10" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="erroreRicetta" type="td:erroreRicettaType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Ripetizione di ErroreRicetta</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="comunicazione" type="td:comunicazioneType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Ripetizione di Comunicazioni di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="flagPromemoria" type="td:string1Type" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Flg restituzione promemoria</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="pdfPromemoria" type="xs:base64Binary" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Promemoria in pdf</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

con:call.name: Test
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:inv="http://invioprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:tip="http://tipodatiinvioprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <inv:InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta>\r <inv:pinCode>dyGL6AscUj2CaHY2PFLFKHTh0R4btCkTe/imyyjCv6DTmnHZICD3zqPYVVoZrLvI72MrMBz4Tv4dE7Z124qssn2K5/O+OEcjRq3+zwQO6PlO6uQ04fnTEuHtX8yvd6ZrmPuiMhhY7r5OLB05k/a564KKSwcu01Wzhf4If2rw19U=</inv:pinCode>\r <inv:cfMedico>PROVAX00X00X000Y</inv:cfMedico>\r <inv:codRegione>130</inv:codRegione>\r <inv:codASLAo>201</inv:codASLAo>\r <inv:codStruttura/>\r <inv:codSpecializzazione>F</inv:codSpecializzazione>\r <inv:specialClinica/>\r <inv:numIscrizAlbo>123456</inv:numIscrizAlbo>\r <inv:indirMedico>Via Medico, 88|00100|Roma|RM</inv:indirMedico>\r <inv:telefMedico>+39|0765488120</inv:telefMedico>\r <inv:codicePaziente>W2yoR8ESa581Uw8EI0b7MXRjdckNKzCZO2JULzYMhqSFyn7qo8j2Kp3K+kVx8UdYRO20HHIfgjPvCTYeD0rETPtE88d8TJbtrP/07GXAp3QqyHbxy3YVMXTi0T1aye+ET0hKcd5vwWXbpn2TfHT7mbSrrqOxAC2S3VMmRDl+vUU=</inv:codicePaziente>\r <inv:cognNome>TIZIO CAIO</inv:cognNome>\r <inv:indirizzo>Via Tizio Caio, 24|00065|Fiano Romano|RM</inv:indirizzo>\r <inv:tipoPrescrizione>F</inv:tipoPrescrizione>\r <inv:codDiagnosi>V48.4</inv:codDiagnosi>\r <inv:descrDiagnosi>Diagnosi inserita da WS</inv:descrDiagnosi>\r <inv:dataCompilazione>2023-11-21 08:30:00</inv:dataCompilazione>\r <inv:dettaglioPrescrizioneRicettaBianca>\r <tip:codProdPrest>033052034</tip:codProdPrest>\r <tip:descrProdPrest>NIMESULIDE MYL*100MG 30BUST.</tip:descrProdPrest>\r <tip:tdl>0</tip:tdl>\r <tip:descrTestoLiberoNote>Note di prova inserite da WS</tip:descrTestoLiberoNote>\r <tip:quantita>1</tip:quantita>\r <tip:posologia>Posologia di prova inserite da WS</tip:posologia>\r </inv:dettaglioPrescrizioneRicettaBianca>\r </inv:InvioPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://annullaprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:ricevutans="http://annullaprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:richiestans="http://annullaprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="http://annullaprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <wsdl:documentation>Versione 1.2</wsdl:documentation> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:import namespace="http://annullaprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> <xsd:schema elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:import namespace="http://annullaprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="ricevuta"> <wsdl:part name="AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta" element="ricevutans:AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="richiesta"> <wsdl:part name="AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta" element="richiestans:AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="annullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaPT"> <wsdl:operation name="annullaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <wsdl:input message="tns:richiesta"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:ricevuta"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="annullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaBinding" type="tns:annullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaPT"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="annullaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://annullaprescrittoricettabianca.wsdl.dem.sanita.finanze.it/AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="demAnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"> <wsdl:port name="demAnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBianca" binding="tns:annullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:9080/DemRicettaBiancaPrescrittoServicesWeb/services/demAnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBianca"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://annullaprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://annullaprescrittoricettabiancarichiesta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:td="http://tipodatiannullaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:import namespace="http://tipodatiannullaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="TipiDatiAnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBianca.xsd"/> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:element name="AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRichiesta"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elemento base per la richiesta di annullamento della ricetta bianca prescritta dal medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="pinCode" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>PinCode inviante</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codicePaziente" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Fiscale/STP/ENI che rappresenta l'assistito per cui viene compilata la ricetta</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nrbe" type="td:nrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="pinNrbe" type="td:pinNrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero breve Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cfMedico" type="td:cfMedicoType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice fiscale del medico</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="opzioniRequest" type="td:opzioniType" maxOccurs="10" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://tipodatiannullaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://tipodatiannullaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:simpleType name="stringType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:maxLength value="256"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="cfMedicoType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="16"/> <xs:maxLength value="16"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="dataOraType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="19"/> <xs:maxLength value="19"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="nrbeType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="12"/> <xs:maxLength value="12"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="pinNrbeType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="5"/> <xs:maxLength value="5"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codEsitoType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[0-9]{4}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:complexType name="erroreRicettaType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codEsito" type="codEsitoType"/> <xs:element name="esito" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="identificativoProdPrest" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="tipoErrore" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="comunicazioneType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codice" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice della comunicazione di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="messaggio" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Messaggio di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="opzioniType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="chiave" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Chiave del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="valore" type="stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Valore del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="tipo" type="stringType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Tipologia del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://annullaprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" xmlns="http://annullaprescrittoricettabiancaricevuta.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:td="http://tipodatiannullaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:import namespace="http://tipodatiannullaprescrittoricettabianca.xsd.dem.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="TipiDatiAnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBianca.xsd"/> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 1.2</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:element name="AnnullaPrescrittoRicettaBiancaRicevuta"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="protocolloTransazione" type="td:stringType" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Identificativo univoco della transazione</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="dataRicezione" type="td:dataOraType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Data ricezione della transazione</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="nrbe" type="td:nrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="pinNrbe" type="td:pinNrbeType" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Numero breve Ricetta Bianca Elettronica</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="codEsitoAnnullamento" type="td:codEsitoType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice dell'esito dell'annullamento</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="opzioniResponse" type="td:opzioniType" maxOccurs="10" minOccurs="0"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="erroreRicetta" type="td:erroreRicettaType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Ripetizione di ErroreRicetta</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="comunicazione" type="td:comunicazioneType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Ripetizione di Comunicazioni di servizio</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>
